note: L5 cross-check: for each `# security:`-tagged patch, whether its LOCKED upstream blob/hunk anchor changed vs the checked ref. A finding means Mozilla touched the code a mitigation rides on — they may have fixed it (drop the patch) or refactored (re-verify). Empty list = the honest baseline (zero security-tagged patches). Overlay mitigations in configs/security-mitigations.json are chrome JS, not upstream-anchored — out of scope here.
